<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Let me look at the black bars and try clicking on them
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')

for row in range(64):
    line = ascii_lines[row]
    black_cols = [j for j, c in enumerate(line) if c == 'B']
    if black_cols:
        print(f"  Row {row}: black at cols {min(black_cols)}-{max(black_cols)}")

print("\nTrying to click on the black bar at row ~20...")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
